children.name: Login
Valid credentials grant access
should login successfully as standard_user and reach inventory @smoke @regression
Inventory page title is shown after login
should display inventory title after login @regression
Wrong password shows error
should show error for wrong password @smoke @regression
Empty username shows username required error
should show error for empty username @regression
Empty password shows password required error
should show error for empty password @regression
Both fields empty shows username required error first
should show username required error when both fields are empty @regression
SQL injection in username does not grant access
should not authenticate with SQL injection payload @regression @security
XSS payload in username does not grant access or execute script
should not authenticate with XSS payload and must not execute script @regression @security
Error banner can be closed
should allow error banner to be dismissed @regression
Locked out user cannot login
should show locked out error for locked_out_user @smoke @regression
should display inventory title after login @regression
should login successfully as standard_user and reach inventory @smoke @regression
Session
Session persists across page navigation
should persist session when navigating between pages @regression
Direct URL access without session redirects to login
should redirect unauthenticated user to login when accessing inventory directly @regression
Browser back after logout does not restore authenticated session
should prevent back-navigation to protected pages after logout @regression
Logout
Authenticated user can log out
should log out successfully and return to login page @smoke @regression
should show error for wrong password @smoke @regression
should show error for empty username @regression
Add to Cart
Cart badge reflects item count after adding one item
should update cart badge when a single item is added @smoke @regression
Added item appears in cart with correct details
should show the added item in the cart with correct name and price @regression
Cart badge reflects correct count after adding multiple items
should update cart badge correctly when multiple items are added @smoke @regression
All added items appear in cart list
should show all added items in the cart @regression
should show error for empty password @regression
should show username required error when both fields are empty @regression
Remove from Cart
Removing an item decrements the cart badge
should remove an item from the cart and update badge @smoke @regression
Removing one item leaves other cart items intact
should remove a specific item from the cart page and leave others intact @regression
Add to Cart button reappears after item removal
should show Add to Cart button again after item is removed @regression
Cart is empty after removing the only item
should show empty cart after removing all items @regression
should not authenticate with SQL injection payload @regression @security
should not authenticate with XSS payload and must not execute script @regression @security
Cart Persistence
Cart items survive navigation to inventory and back
should persist cart items when navigating back to inventory @regression
Cart items survive a full page reload
should persist cart items after page reload @regression
Listing
All 6 products are shown
should display the correct number of products @smoke @regression
Product names match expected catalogue
should display correct product names @regression
All products have visible price labels
should display prices for all products @regression
All product images load correctly for standard_user
should display product images with non-empty src attributes (standard_user) @regression
should allow error banner to be dismissed @regression
Sorting
Name A→Z sort produces alphabetical order
should sort products by Name A→Z @smoke @regression
Name Z→A sort produces reverse alphabetical order
should sort products by Name Z→A @regression
Price Low→High sort produces ascending price order
should sort products by Price Low→High @regression
Price High→Low sort produces descending price order
should sort products by Price High→Low @regression
Switching sort options re-orders the list correctly
should re-sort correctly when switching sort options @regression
should show locked out error for locked_out_user @smoke @regression
should display inventory title after login @regression
should login successfully as standard_user and reach inventory @smoke @regression
Visual Regression
problem_user sees broken/mismatched product images (known defect)
should detect that problem_user sees incorrect/broken product images @regression
standard_user sees 6 distinct product images
should confirm standard_user sees unique product images @regression
should persist session when navigating between pages @regression
should log out successfully and return to login page @smoke @regression
Purchase
Full purchase flow completes successfully
should complete a full purchase with a single item @smoke @regression @e2e

should clear the cart after a successful order @regression

Validation
Missing first name blocks checkout progress
should block checkout when first name is missing @smoke @regression
Missing last name blocks checkout progress

Order Summary
Item total, tax (8%), and final total are mathematically correct

Confirmation
Confirmation screen shows correct header, message, image, and button
should display correct confirmation screen content after successful order @smoke @regression
Back Home button navigates to inventory after order
should navigate back to inventory from confirmation screen @regression
